action_set_definitions.name: get_water_quality_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves real-time sensor data from the fish farm environment, including dissolved oxygen, ammonia, and current aerator settings.

action_set_definitions.name: analyze_phytoplankton_imaging
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the site's imaging system to identify specific phytoplankton species and calculate their cellular concentration.

action_set_definitions.name: get_safety_thresholds
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the safety thresholds for water chemicals (ammonia, nitrite) and the species-specific 'Action Level' for ichthyotoxic phytoplankton.

species_name.description: The name of the phytoplankton species to check.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_aeration
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the intensity of the mechanical aeration system.

action_set_definitions.name: control_filtration
action_set_definitions.description: Engages or disengages the biological filtration system.

active.description: True to activate, False to deactivate.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_mitigation
action_set_definitions.description: Executes physical displacement steps to remove phytoplankton biomass from the pens.

method.description: The specific mitigation method to use (e.g., 'physical_displacement_pump').

state_description.water_temperature: The current temperature of the water in degrees Celsius.
state_description.dissolved_oxygen: Concentration of oxygen dissolved in water (mg/L). Values below 5.0 are stressful for most fish.
state_description.ph_level: The acidity or alkalinity of the water on a scale of 0-14.
state_description.ammonia_level: Concentration of Total Ammonia Nitrogen (mg/L). High levels are toxic.
state_description.nitrite_level: Concentration of Nitrites (mg/L), a byproduct of ammonia oxidation.
state_description.water_level: The current depth of the fish tank/pond in meters.
state_description.aerator_intensity: Current power setting of the aeration system (0-100).
state_description.filtration_active: Whether the biological filtration system is currently engaged.
state_description.fish_biomass: Total weight of fish in the environment (kg), affecting oxygen consumption and waste production.
